plugins.name: clast
plugins.description: Capture, curate, and surface Claude Code session history across all your projects.

plugins.name: direnv-session-loader
plugins.description: Loads the project's direnv .envrc at session start (worktree-aware) so Claude Code's non-interactive Bash tool inherits the environment.

plugins.name: prtend
plugins.description: Tend your PR while you pretend you're not procrastinating. Subscribes to CI and review events after a push, fixes what can be fixed, resolves review comments deterministically.
